category_sources: Official documentation homepage says fpm is a package manager and build system for Fortran.
source_facts.description says package manager and build system for Fortran.
display_name_sources: Official documentation homepage title is Fortran Package Manager.
source_facts.name provides the executable/package name fpm.
docs_sources: Official docs page welcomes users to the documentation for the Fortran Package Manager.
source_facts.homepage is the dedicated official documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/fortran-lang/fpm; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official documentation homepage describes installation, tutorials, how-to guides, references, and registry support.
